title: UK PM announces ban on social media for under-16s
summary_full: The government said the ban will include platforms like Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X
summary_public: The government said the ban will include platforms like Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X
